note: Phase F ships bloom filter write + Puffin NDV sketch emission in the coordinator batch path. Read probe and worker-side streaming write deferred. bloom-filters:v2 none->partial (+2), bloom-filters:v3 none->partial (+2).

sqe:equality-deletes:v2.notes: Writer exists in vendored iceberg-rust; no SQE commit path.

sqe:merge-on-read:v2.notes: DELETE emits position deletes; UPDATE and MERGE still CoW.

sqe:copy-on-write:v2.notes: DELETE/UPDATE/MERGE via RisingWave iceberg-rust fork rewrite_files().

sqe:schema-evolution:v3.notes: ADD COLUMN with DEFAULT uses initial_default; existing V2 evolution ops apply to V3 tables.

sqe:type-promotion:v3.notes: Existing V2 widening rules apply to V3 tables; nanosec-to-microsecond narrowing not attempted.

sqe:column-default-values:v3.notes: CREATE TABLE ... DEFAULT <literal> applies write_default; ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN ... DEFAULT applies initial_default. Function-call defaults rejected with clear error.

sqe:table-creation:v3.notes: CREATE TABLE emits format-version: 3 when any V3-only feature is used; V2-only schemas remain format-version: 2 for compat.

sqe:time-travel:v2.notes: FOR SYSTEM_TIME AS OF + 6 metadata TVFs (Step 8c).

sqe:time-travel:v3.notes: FOR SYSTEM_TIME AS OF works against V3 tables using the same snapshot walk.

sqe:table-maintenance:v2.notes: CALL system.expire_snapshots / remove_orphan_files / rewrite_manifests wrap vendored actions. rewrite_data_files currently consolidates manifests only (no Parquet re-encoding); full compaction lands as a Phase B follow-up.
caveats: rewrite_data_files does not re-encode Parquet payloads.

sqe:table-maintenance:v3.notes: Same procedures apply to format-version 3 tables; same rewrite_data_files caveat.
caveats: rewrite_data_files does not re-encode Parquet payloads.

sqe:branching-tagging:v2.notes: Transaction::{create_branch, create_tag, drop_branch, drop_tag} in vendored iceberg-rust + ALTER TABLE ... CREATE BRANCH/TAG DDL + SET WRITE_BRANCH session var. Main branch drop rejected.

sqe:branching-tagging:v3.notes: Same transaction actions apply to V3 tables; ref semantics are format-version agnostic.

sqe:read-support:v3.notes: V3 tables produced by SQE are readable via existing iceberg-rust scan path (nanosec types supported, defaults materialised on read).

sqe:write-insert:v3.notes: INSERT into V3 tables works when columns use nanosec timestamps or typed defaults; V3-only types (Variant, geometry) still unsupported.

sqe:write-merge-update-delete:v2.notes: All three DML ops via CoW rewrite_files().

sqe:statistics:v2.notes: Column metrics used for pruning and CBO.

sqe:bloom-filters:v2.notes: write.parquet.bloom-filter-columns + write.parquet.bloom-filter-fpp honoured in the coordinator's CTAS/INSERT batch path. DataFusion reads blooms automatically from Parquet files. Puffin theta-sketch sidecar emitted via puffin_stats module. CALL system.suggest_bloom_filter_columns analyses query history.
caveats: Worker / streaming write path (sqe-worker) not wired; distributed writes miss blooms.
Read-probe end-to-end verification (files_pruned_bloom via EXPLAIN ANALYZE) deferred -- needs docker-compose.test.yml.
DataFusion StatisticsSource consumer for Puffin NDV is blocked on DF 54 (apache/datafusion#21157).

sqe:bloom-filters:v3.notes: Writer path is format-version agnostic; V3 tables produce bloom-enabled Parquet. V3-specific integration tests not run yet.
caveats: V3 end-to-end tests not run; marked partial pending integration run.

sqe:hive-metastore:v2.notes: Config scaffolding only at backends/hms.rs; all calls return SqeError::Catalog. Functional wiring arrives with upstream iceberg-catalog-hms adoption.
caveats: Marker only; no functional HMS access yet.

sqe:aws-glue-catalog:v2.notes: Config scaffolding only at backends/glue.rs; all calls return SqeError::Catalog. Functional wiring arrives with upstream iceberg-catalog-glue adoption.
caveats: Marker only; no functional GLUE access yet.

sqe:nessie:v2.notes: Works via iceberg-catalog-rest against Nessie's REST adapter; documented in docs/deployment.md Section 5b.
caveats: Write parity depends on Nessie's REST adapter completeness.

sqe:unity-catalog:v2.notes: Compatible via REST; OIDC M2M auth provider landed in Phase A.
caveats: No live integration test against Unity Catalog yet.

sqe:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v2.notes: Horizon is Polaris-based; REST wiring compatible; no live test.

sqe:hadoop-catalog:v2.notes: Storage-only scanner walks warehouse paths for metadata/v*.metadata.json (feature `hadoop`). Read path only; writes defer to REST/HMS.
caveats: Write path is race-prone on object stores without atomic rename; intentionally read-oriented.

sqe:jdbc-catalog:v2.notes: SQLite roundtrip implemented and tested (feature `sql`); PostgreSQL arrives via upstream iceberg-catalog-sql (task 2.11).
caveats: PostgreSQL path pinned to apache/iceberg-rust adoption in task 2.11.

sqe:variant-type:v3.notes: Deferred to next cycle. iceberg-rust #2188 not merged.

sqe:vector-type:v3.notes: Deferred. Iceberg V3 vector spec not finalised.

sqe:nanosecond-timestamps:v3.notes: TIMESTAMP_NS(N) and TIMESTAMPTZ_NS(N) DDL route to PrimitiveType::TimestampNs/TimestamptzNs; Arrow bridge and INSERT/SELECT wiring covered by v3_types_integration.
